message:
test: expand fcp-store and fcp-mesh test suites with coverage, GC,
object store, quarantine, and admission policy edge cases

Add comprehensive test coverage across storage and mesh infrastructure
modules.

crates/fcp-store/src/coverage.rs (+311 lines):
- CoverageEvaluation tests: deficit below target, at target, above
  target, zero distribution handling, single-symbol edge cases
- SymbolDistribution property tests: add/remove symbol consistency,
  coverage basis point calculations

crates/fcp-store/src/gc.rs (+252 lines):
- GcConfig serde roundtrip, default values validation
- GcRoots: clone behavior, all_roots aggregation, pinned root
  handling
- GC collection with various root configurations and eviction limits

crates/fcp-store/src/object_store.rs (+152 lines):
- Object store put/get/delete lifecycle tests
- Concurrent access patterns and key collision handling
- Size tracking and capacity enforcement edge cases

crates/fcp-store/src/quarantine.rs (+207 lines):
- Quarantine entry lifecycle: add, check, release, expire
- Zone-scoped quarantine enforcement with byte and object limits
- Quarantine overflow behavior and eviction ordering

crates/fcp-mesh/src/admission.rs:
- Rename 3 test functions for clarity: object_admission_policy_defaults
  → object_admission_policy_default_field_values, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
